indicate that the individual is not eligible for subsidized Part D coverage. There are 12 monthly 
variables — where the 01 through 12 at the end of the variable name correspond with the month 
(e.g., 01 is January and 12 is December). 

Beginning with the 2024 benefit year CMS made changes to the Part D benefit structure so all 
individuals eligible for extra help receive a full (100%) subsidy. Prior to 2024, beneficiaries eligible
